div.class: boq_dash_header d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between px-4 py-3 border-bottom
boq_notif_header d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between flex-wrap gap-2

div.small: The following quotations were submitted in the last 7 days. Click a row to open and review.

div.class: boq_vc_footer d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between flex-wrap gap-1
boq_tree_summary_bar d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 px-4 pb-3

i.class: fa fa-info-circle fa-3x mb-3 d-block text-primary opacity-50

t.small: Open a BOQ, select Work Categories, assign s, then click Create RFQ.

span.title: Submitted in last 7 days — review needed
